title: sorghum procerum
intro: Sorghum procerum is a perennial grass plant that belongs to the Sorghum genus and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sorghum procerum include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sorghum procerum can be made into a poultice, which can be applied topically to affected areas, or infused as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
